title: Per-issue validation scoping
description:
Scope the per-issue validation gate to the issue under review.

## Background

The jit-validate gate checker is a bare `jit validate` (.jit/gates.json:193), which runs whole-repo validation (`run_rules(None)`) and so fails the issue on unrelated repo-wide findings. The single-issue path `run_rules(Some(id))` already exists (commands/validate.rs:944-982) and `JIT_ISSUE_ID` is already injected into gate execution (gate_execution.rs:53).

## Success Criteria

- [hard] REQ-12: the per-issue validation gate evaluates only the issue under review and does not fail on unrelated repository-wide findings.

## Notes

Point the gate checker at the single issue (`jit validate $JIT_ISSUE_ID`, the `run_rules(Some(id))` path), not the container-subtree `--scope`. Touch the jit-validate gate checker command (.jit/gates.json) and any preset that defines it; self-contained.
